title: A'den
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Senior clone commander]]|the [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando|Null ARC trooper]] [[A'den Skirata]]}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=A'den
CT-80/88-3009 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]. |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}}{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=[[Color/Legends|Tan]] |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[7th Legion]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''A'den''' (pronounced AH-den''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{C|Rear Mando'a Dictionary}}), designated '''CT-80/88-3009''', was a [[senior clone commander]] in command of the [[7th Legion]], a division of the [[327th Star Corps/Legends|327th Star Corps]]. "A'den" was a word in the [[Mando'a/Legends|''Mando'a'']] [[Language/Legends|language]] that meant "rage" or "wrath." As a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]], A'den was created on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] from the [[Clone template/Legends|clone template]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. The [[Gender|male]] [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] shared the template's [[Color/Legends|tan]] skin and height of 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. ==Behind the scenes== A'den was first mentioned in the "[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]," an reference article in the [[Star Wars Insider 84|eighty-fourth issue]] of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'', released on [[September 26]], [[2005]].{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20050913.html|text=The Ultimate Clone Guide in ''Star Wars Insider'' #84}} Named by author [[Karen Traviss]], it was the same name given to [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando|''Null''-class Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[A'den Skirata|N-12]]. This is to set up how coincidental names are chosen by [[Clone trooper/Legends|troopers]] in the Grand Army, such as troopers with the last digit in their [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] being five, the trooper may take the name "Fi". {{Char-stub}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} {{1stm}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=CT-80/88-3009 |pl=CT-80/88-3009 |hu=CT-80/88-3009 "A'den" }} [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Members of the 327th Star Corps]] [[Category:Members of the 7th Legion]] [[Category:Senior clone commanders]]
